summary: Video retry loop fix verified. ALL TESTS PASSED. No 429 rate limiting errors detected. Homepage loads correctly on both desktop (1920x800) and mobile (390x844) with dark luxury theme. Navigation (Projects, Solutions, Services) works. Admin login with credentials admin/lexa2026 successful. Theme toggle (dark/light) working. Mobile tab bar visible.

video_retry_fix.details: HeroCurator.tsx has MAX_VIDEO_ERRORS=3 limit, DEFAULT_CLIPS reduced to 2, preload='metadata'. No infinite retry loops detected.

rate_limiting.details: Zero 429 rate limit errors in console logs across all tests

desktop_homepage_1920x800.cta_buttons: All 3 visible - Find Solution (gold), WhatsApp (green), View Projects (outline)

mobile_homepage_390x844.mobile_tab_bar: visible with Home, Builder, Projects, Services, Contact

navigation_pages.projects: PASS - /projects loads correctly with project cards
navigation_pages.services: PASS - /services loads with Full-Service Integration content

critical_code_review_comments: HeroCurator.tsx video error handling correctly implemented with MAX_VIDEO_ERRORS=3 cap
DEFAULT_CLIPS reduced from 6 to 2 to minimize rate limiting risk

success_rate.frontend: 100% - homepage, navigation, admin, theme toggle all working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Video retry loop bug fix verified. The key fix was in HeroCurator.tsx: MAX_VIDEO_ERRORS=3 prevents infinite retries, videoFailed state stops video loading after max errors. No 429 rate limit errors during testing with 8-10 second delays between page loads. All navigation pages work. Admin login: admin/lexa2026.
